table.keys: Interface, Direction, Register Mode, TDATA, TKEEP, TLAST, TREADY, TSTRB, TVALID

Msg.msg_body: Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region

Since the only kind of statements allowed in a canonical dataflow region are variable declarations and function calls, the compiler may not be able to correctly handle the region (../myip_v2_0_HLS.cpp:46:9)
